baseline.note: ledger totals that predate canonical lifecycle accounting (accounted explicitly)

reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

tradingview_latest_signal.indicator_name: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v4 Orderflow Loose

BTCUSD.indicator_name: Hermes BTC Pulse Composite v4 Orderflow Loose

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only — they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades — never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade — learning can never bypass them.

last_note.summary: DOWN_STRONG signals (n=64, wr=0.5938) and range_bottom entries (n=33, wr=0.7879) show confirmed positive EV and pnl after costs with n>=8; lower_wick_rejection and dead-volume states also appear profitable while UP and short-ttc buckets remain loss-making. Overall sample pnl is still negative due to UP and <60s trades dragging results despite positive avg_ev_after_cost across most buckets. Sample size remains modest so selectivity on DOWN + favorable range/candle states is the clearest edge.
warnings: Total settled n=115 still modest; many buckets near n=8-20 threshold so overfitting risk high
UP direction and short-hold trades consistently destroy pnl
avg_ev positive but realized pnl negative indicates cost or slippage drag not fully captured
changes_since_last: First analysis; no prior baseline available
focus_next: Track DOWN_STRONG + range_bottom + lower_wick intersections for confirmation
Monitor if >=240s and dead-volume filters continue to add edge as n grows
Ignore or deprioritize all UP and <60s buckets until n>30 and wr sustainably above breakeven

history.summary: DOWN signals, especially DOWN_STRONG (n=62, WR 0.597, +19.5 USD), range_bottom entries (n=32, WR 0.781), and ttc >=120s buckets show confirmed positive EV after costs with n>=8 and WR comfortably above breakeven; UP direction and ttc<60s remain reliably negative. Volume dead/active and bearish MTF alignment add modest edge while most other regimes (z-score, BB, Hurst, spread) are flat or noisy. Overall sample of 108 remains small with net negative realized PnL, indicating selectivity is still too loose.

DOWN_STRONG (n=62, WR 0.597, +19.5 pnl), range_bottom (n=32, WR 0.781, +51 pnl), unknown CVD (n=56, WR 0.607, +26 pnl) and dead volume (n=45, WR 0.60, +12 pnl) now show confirmed positive EV with n>30 and WR above breakeven after costs; most other large buckets (trending n=102, zscore -1..1 n=70, v4 n=80) remain near-breakeven or negative with high variance. Overall 111 trades still show net negative realized pnl despite positive avg_ev_after_cost, indicating selectivity or cost modeling issues. No prior analysis provided so no changes tracked.

DOWN_STRONG (n=62, wr=0.597, +19.5 pnl), range_bottom (n=32, wr=0.781, +51.2 pnl), lower_wick_rejection (n=17, wr=0.706, +24.7 pnl), bearish_aligned mtf (n=43, wr=0.581, +21.2 pnl), unknown cvd (n=56, wr=0.607, +26.2 pnl) and dead volume (n=45, wr=0.6, +12.2 pnl) now show confirmed positive realized EV with n>=8 and wr above breakeven after costs. Most other buckets (including UP signals, short ttc, high z-score, volume spike) remain negative or too small and appear noise. Overall sample still shows high variance with aggregate pnl negative despite positive avg_ev.

DOWN_STRONG (n=64, wr=0.5938, +17.7 pnl), range_bottom (n=33, wr=0.788, +54.4 pnl), lower_wick_rejection (n=17, wr=0.706, +24.7 pnl), bearish_aligned mtf (n=43, wr=0.581, +21.2 pnl), unknown cvd (n=56, wr=0.607, +26.2 pnl), and dead volume (n=47, wr=0.596, +10.4 pnl) show confirmed positive EV above breakeven with n>=8 and reconciled data; trending regime and <=0.01 spread dominate volume but drag overall pnl negative.

DOWN_STRONG signals (n=64, wr=0.5938, +17.7 pnl) and range_bottom entries (n=33, wr=0.7879, +54.4 pnl) now show confirmed positive EV with n>=8 and win-rates above breakeven after costs; lower_wick_rejection, dead volume, bearish_mtf_aligned and unknown_cvd buckets also clear the bar while most UP and short-ttc buckets remain negative. Overall book is still down ~42 USD on 115 trades due to UP and range_top drag. Sample growth has stabilized a few high-n buckets but many remain too thin or mixed.
changes_since_last: DOWN_STRONG and range_bottom now cross confirmed threshold with added samples; UP weakness and short-ttc losses more clearly delineated

history.summary: DOWN_STRONG (n=64, wr=0.5938, +17.7 pnl), range_bottom (n=33, wr=0.7879, +54.4 pnl), lower_wick_rejection (n=17, wr=0.7059, +24.7 pnl), dead volume, unknown cvd, and bearish_aligned mtf buckets show confirmed positive EV with n>=8 and wr above typical breakeven; UP direction, <60s ttc, volume spike, and 1..2 zscore remain negative pnl and overfit noise. Overall settled pnl negative despite positive avg_ev_after_cost ~0.11 across 115 trades. No prior analysis available so all patterns treated as initial observations.

DOWN_STRONG (n=64, wr=0.5938, +17.7 pnl), range_bottom (n=33, wr=0.7879, +54.4 pnl), lower_wick_rejection (n=17, wr=0.7059, +24.7 pnl), bearish_aligned mtf (n=43, wr=0.5814, +21.2 pnl), unknown cvd (n=56, wr=0.6071, +26.2 pnl), and dead volume (n=47, wr=0.5957, +10.4 pnl) now show confirmed positive EV with n>=8 and wr above breakeven after costs; all other buckets remain negative or too small. UP signals, <60s ttc, volume spike, and range_top continue to lose. Sample of 115 is still modest so selectivity remains critical.

DOWN_STRONG signals (n=64, wr=0.5938) and range_bottom entries (n=33, wr=0.7879) show confirmed positive EV and pnl after costs with n>=8; lower_wick_rejection and dead-volume states also appear profitable while UP and short-ttc buckets remain loss-making. Overall sample pnl is still negative due to UP and <60s trades dragging results despite positive avg_ev_after_cost across most buckets. Sample size remains modest so selectivity on DOWN + favorable range/candle states is the clearest edge.

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only — never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only — never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

headlines: BTC drops to ~$62k amid $717M+ liquidations and Nasdaq/tech selloff
Bitcoin ETFs see net outflows (~$68M reported) despite some Ark/Fidelity inflows
Ongoing leverage flush and macro risk-off pressure (Fed hawkish, ETF redemptions)

verifier.note: independent Claude maker-checker; can only veto/shrink a Grok-proposed paper trade, never force one; fail-open; PAPER ONLY.

last_note.summary: 373 settled trades, 52.3% win rate, -$94 PnL, profit factor 0.84. No directional edge: TradingView signal hit rate 53.9% vs 42.1% baseline is noise (n=115). DOWN trades (58.8% win, n=85) slightly better than UP (40% win, n=30), but losses exceed wins ($3.97 avg loss vs $3.04 avg win). Execution gate rejecting 48 negative-EV trades shows gate is working, but not enough.

knob_recommendations.reason: avg_ev_after_costs=0.107 correlates with losses; raise threshold to filter marginal trades
avg_loss/avg_win=1.31 is toxic; cap loss size relative to wins
UP trades at 0.58 strength lose; require stronger conviction

new_lessons.rule: UP trades: 40% win rate (n=30) vs DOWN 58.8% (n=85); avoid UP until sample-backed edge appears
volume_state=dead in latest signal; correlate volume_state with outcomes, likely poor execution environment
avg_loss ($3.97) > avg_win ($3.03) erodes edge; enforce stop-loss or position-sizing discipline
TradingView signal hit rate 53.9% vs 42.1% baseline (n=115) is not statistically significant; do not rely on signal direction alone

research_loop.note: strategy-layer research meta-loop: independent model proposes exploit/avoid contexts + bounded knob nudges + lessons. Observe-only unless auto_apply (whitelisted+bounded). PAPER ONLY.

recent.rule: 320 TradingView signals consumed as features but no +PnL; exogenous indicators add no value
trending regime (Hurst) loses: 25% WR, -$17. Mean reversion unlikely viable at 5-min BTC scale.
ttc <60s and 120-240s both lose similarly. Time decay not a differentiator.
conviction <0.2 won (n=2, +$4.7), >=0.8 lost (n=1, -$5). Noise, not signal—wait for n>20.
Brier 0.2299 vs baseline 0.25, edge_model buckets show no monotonic relationship to empirical_up. Model uncalibrated.
48 trades rejected for negative_ev_after_slippage. Gate working, but upstream model still generates bad candidates.
chop_noise, trend_down, resolution_danger, stale_polymarket_down all negative PnL. No state has edge.
373 settled but only 8-9 per context bucket. Need 500+ settled, stratified, before claiming any edge.
UP trades: 40% win rate (n=30) vs DOWN 58.8% (n=85); avoid UP until sample-backed edge appears
volume_state=dead in latest signal; correlate volume_state with outcomes, likely poor execution environment
avg_loss ($3.97) > avg_win ($3.03) erodes edge; enforce stop-loss or position-sizing discipline
TradingView signal hit rate 53.9% vs 42.1% baseline (n=115) is not statistically significant; do not rely on signal direction alone

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop. PAPER ONLY.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective — never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.
